let f := rotproj_inner S w
    let D_explicit := rotproj_inner' pbar S w
    let D_chain := (fderivInnerCLM ℝ ((rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 1) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 2) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 0)) S, w)).comp ((rotprojRM' S).prod 0)

      -- Assuming the Noperthedron library provides the necessary differentiability

    have h_chain : HasFDerivAt f D_chain pbar.innerParams := by
      apply HasFDerivAt.comp (pbar.innerParams)
      · apply HasFDerivAt.inner
        · exact hasFDerivAt_id _
        · exact hasFDerivAt_const _ _
      · exact z1

    exact h_explicit.unique h_chain
